Sanitized Qianwen user prompt before an empty share-selection node.

Sanitized Qianwen assistant answer after empty share-selection.

Sanitized Qianwen second user prompt with Qwen wording.

Sanitized Qianwen assistant answer with preserved table wrappers.

Field Value
Sanitized Qianwen final user prompt nested in a last-message item.

Sanitized Qianwen final assistant answer from a nested last-message item. 

const qianwenLiveRoute = true;
